decision.summary: Hold the existing 67k daily long for now and do not open any new BTC position.
decision.rationale: Live Polymarket shows one meaningful BTC position, `will-bitcoin-reach-67k-on-march-29` on `Yes`, now at 22.6% probability: it is weak, but still above the playbook stop-loss threshold of 20% and far from take-profit. The latest transcript and recent summaries keep Beecthor macro-bearish, yet still allow a tactical rebound/short squeeze into 67k-70k before larger downside resumes; Binance at 66052.7 after a 24h low of 65000 keeps that rebound path alive, though weaker than before. No new trade is justified because the daily slot is already occupied and no weekly/monthly BTC markets are provided here. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
